text: - ii. Additional Insureds. Except with regard to Workers' Compensation and Professional liability insurance (where applicable), all insurance required by  this  Section  shall  name  the  parties  identified  in Schedule  A as additional  insureds (hereinafter,  collectively  the  'Additional  Insureds'). For the Commercial General Liability insurance, additional insured status must be provided on ISO forms CG 20 10 and CG 20 37.
